leadText: The Ability Patch (Japanese: とくせいパッチ Ability Patch) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII. It changes a Pokémon's Ability.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Bag item 1.1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.2 Generation IX 1.2 Held item Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] If used from the Bag , it changes the Ability slot of a Pokémon from one of its standard Abilities to its Hidden Ability . As a result, if the Pokémon evolves and has a different Hidden Ability than its Evolution, its Evolution will have the Hidden Ability. A Pokémon that has its Hidden Ability due to the Ability Patch can also pass down its Hidden Ability via breeding . The Ability Patch can only be used on a Pokémon that belongs to a species with a Hidden Ability. For example, it can be used to change a Rookidee 's Ability from Keen Eye or Unnerve to Big Pecks , but it cannot be used to change a Metapod 's Ability (which is always Shed Skin ). Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] The Ability Patch cannot be used to change a Pokémon's Ability from its Hidden Ability to one of its standard Abilities. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] The Ability Patch can now remove a Hidden Ability, setting the Ability to the Pokémon's first Ability slot. Held item [ edit | edit source ] Fling fails if the user is holding an Ability Patch.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability. S V A patch that can be used to change the regular Ability of a Pokémon to a rarer Ability.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh CT Max Lair (after catching and keeping Necrozma from a Dynamax Adventure ) Max Lair ( Dynite Ore trader) BD SP Battle Park (200 BP ) S V Tera Raid Battles (6★, 7★) S V TM Reward for defeating Muramasa of the Kitakami Ogre Clan S V ID Reward for registering 230 Pokémon in the Blueberry Pokédex Terarium (at the top of the Terarium Core) Terarium (×5; from a guidance counselor for defeating every Trainer in every biome) League Club Room (reward for defeating Rika ) Item Printer Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero guide book's Nurturing Support Set All March 15, 2024 to April 30, 2026
